patients.name: Ravi Shankar

past_sessions.message: I've been experiencing numbness in my feet for the past week
past_sessions.diagnosis: Diabetic neuropathy — early peripheral nerve involvement
past_sessions.outcome: Referred to endocrinologist. Started on gabapentin 100mg.

patients.story: Ravi is a 52-year-old school teacher from Bangalore managing diabetes and hypertension. He visits regularly for diabetic check-ups. Today he complains of persistent headache and blurred vision for 3 days — could be a hypertensive crisis.

patients.name: Ananya Iyer

past_sessions.message: My asthma has been getting worse, especially at night. I'm using my inhaler 4 times a day now
past_sessions.outcome: Added Fluticasone 250mcg inhaler. Advised to avoid triggers.

patients.story: Ananya is a 28-year-old software engineer who has had asthma since childhood. She recently moved to a new apartment and her symptoms have worsened. Today she messages about severe wheezing and difficulty breathing after exposure to construction dust near her building.

patients.name: Mohammed Farhan

past_sessions.message: I've been feeling more tired than usual and sometimes get pain in my left arm during walks
past_sessions.diagnosis: Possible angina — needs urgent cardiology review
past_sessions.outcome: ECG ordered. Stress test scheduled. Advised to avoid exertion.

patients.story: Farhan is a 45-year-old businessman with known heart disease. He had a stent placed 2 years ago. Today he messages about sudden chest tightness and sweating — this should trigger the EMERGENCY pathway immediately.

patients.name: Lakshmi Devi

past_sessions.message: My knee pain is getting worse. I can barely walk up the stairs now
past_sessions.diagnosis: Worsening osteoarthritis — knee replacement discussion needed
past_sessions.outcome: X-ray ordered. Referred to orthopedics. Started physiotherapy.

patients.story: Lakshmi is a 67-year-old retired government clerk. She has multiple chronic conditions and manages several medications. Today she reports severe joint pain, swelling in both knees, and extreme fatigue — she's worried about a new flare-up.

patients.name: Arjun Nair
patients.story: Arjun is a 19-year-old college student with no significant medical history. He is a first-time user of DocSync. He messages about a fever and sore throat that started 2 days ago after his friend tested positive for COVID. This tests the NEW PATIENT flow with no prior history.

patients.name: Priya Menon

past_sessions.message: I am having the worst migraine of my life. Throbbing pain on the right side, nausea, can't look at light
past_sessions.diagnosis: Severe migraine with aura — rule out secondary causes
past_sessions.outcome: Given Sumatriptan 100mg. MRI brain ordered to rule out secondary causes.

patients.story: Priya is a 34-year-old graphic designer who suffers from chronic migraines and anxiety. She messages today about a sudden severe headache that is different from her usual migraines — accompanied by slurred speech and face drooping. This should trigger the STROKE emergency pathway.

demo_scenarios.name: Normal Flow — Headache
demo_scenarios.test_message: I have been having a persistent headache for the past 3 days, along with blurred vision. My blood pressure readings at home show 165/95.
demo_scenarios.expected_path: steward → symptom → history → reasoning → fhir → uhi_discovery

demo_scenarios.name: Emergency — Chest Pain
demo_scenarios.test_message: I'm having severe chest tightness and sweating. Pain is radiating to my left arm. I feel like something is very wrong.

demo_scenarios.name: Emergency — Stroke Symptoms
demo_scenarios.test_message: My face is drooping on one side and my speech is slurred. This headache is different from my usual migraines.

demo_scenarios.name: Normal Flow — New Patient
demo_scenarios.test_message: Hi, I've had a fever and sore throat for 2 days. My friend just tested positive for COVID. I'm worried.
demo_scenarios.expected_path: steward → symptom → history → reasoning → fhir → uhi_discovery

demo_scenarios.name: Normal Flow — Chronic Pain
demo_scenarios.test_message: My knee pain is extremely bad today. Both knees are swollen and I feel exhausted. I could barely get out of bed.
demo_scenarios.expected_path: steward → symptom → history → reasoning → fhir → uhi_discovery

demo_scenarios.name: Normal Flow — Breathing Issues
demo_scenarios.test_message: I'm having trouble breathing after being exposed to construction dust near my apartment. My inhaler isn't helping much.
